name: Ithil-Rathgûl
personality: This luminous hatless dragon fixes its × eyes on a broken test with the focused calm of someone who has done this a thousand times and will do it a thousand more, each time finding the real culprit and never blaming the framework. Entropy is interesting in theory — in practice it tidies up behind it.
defaultPersonality: A fierce guardian of clean code who breathes fire at spaghetti logic and hoards well-written functions.
